title: astragalus serpens
intro: Astragalus serpens, also known as serpentine milkvetch, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to boost the immune system and reduce stress. The medicinal properties of Astragalus serpens are believed to have a range of health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the body's natural response to stress. Astragalus serpens is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or supplement, and is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and vitality.
